Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  New patient office visit, level 4  ·  California

New patient office visit, level 4 cost in California.

Cash-pay range for new patient office visit, level 4 across 34 hospitals in California: $20 to $1,012. CPT code 99204. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

$20
Children's Hospital Los Angeles
Los Angeles, CA
